mapper.sql: id, material_code, logical_plant_no, tenant_id, plan_date, source_type, biz_type, amount, voucher_no, document_no, business_id_ref, exception_code, is_delete, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into `pl_demand_supply_source` (id, material_code, logical_plant_no, tenant_id, plan_date, source_type, biz_type, amount, voucher_no, document_no, business_id_ref, exception_code, is_delete, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{materialCode}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{tenantId}, #{planDate}, #{sourceType}, #{bizType}, #{amount}, #{voucherNo}, #{documentNo}, #{businessIdRef}, #{exceptionCode}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into `pl_demand_supply_source` (material_code, logical_plant_no, tenant_id, plan_date, source_type, biz_type, amount, voucher_no, document_no, business_id_ref, exception_code) values
(#{record.materialCode}, #{record.logicalPlantNo}, #{record.tenantId}, #{record.planDate}, #{record.sourceType}, #{record.bizType}, #{record.amount}, #{record.voucherNo}, #{record.documentNo}, #{record.businessIdRef}, #{record.exceptionCode})

insert into `pl_demand_supply_source`
id, material_code, logical_plant_no, tenant_id, plan_date, source_type, biz_type, amount, voucher_no, document_no, business_id_ref, exception_code, is_delete, create_time, update_time,
#{id}, #{materialCode}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{tenantId}, #{planDate}, #{sourceType}, #{bizType}, #{amount}, #{voucherNo}, #{documentNo}, #{businessIdRef}, #{exceptionCode}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update: update `pl_demand_supply_source` set material_code = #{materialCode}, logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, plan_date = #{planDate}, source_type = #{sourceType}, biz_type = #{bizType}, amount = #{amount}, voucher_no = #{voucherNo}, document_no = #{documentNo}, business_id_ref = #{businessIdRef}, exception_code = #{exceptionCode}, is_delete = #{isDelete}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
